label: Normal Operations
description: Steady demand and healthy inventory with standard fuel prices.

label: Demand Spike
description: Demand surges — system increases order quantity and considers faster shipping.

label: Fuel Price Surge
description: Fuel costs spike — system may switch to intermodal despite slower delivery.

label: Expiry Crisis
description: Large batch expiring soon — system prioritizes speed to minimize spoilage waste.

label: Critical Stock
description: Inventory critically low with rising demand — urgent reorder triggered.
